name: Butterscotch Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, cream together the shortening and sugar until smooth.
2. Add the eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
3. Stir in the salt and yeast cakes.
4. Gradually add the water and milk, mixing until a soft dough forms.
5. Knead the dough on a floured surface for 5 minutes until smooth and elastic.
6. Shape the dough into rolls and place in a greased bowl.
7. Cover and let rise in a warm place until doubled in size, about 1 hour.
8. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
9. Fill each roll with desired amount of filling.
10. Place filled rolls on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
11. Bake for 15-20 minutes or until golden brown and firm.
12. Let cool before serving.
